title: Rich Portuguese Chocolate Pie with Dried Chillies
description: A rich and indulgent chocolate pie infused with the spicy kick of dried chillies, suitable for kids to help prepare, catering to Jain dietary restrictions.

ingredients.name: dried chillies
ingredients.notes: use mild varieties for safety, can be crushed finely before mixing

ingredients.name: unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: softened and melted for easier spreading

instructions: Mix flour and softened butter together until crumbly. Press into a pie dish.
In a separate bowl, melt cream cheese in white sugar over low heat.
Add vanilla extract, egg yolks, and water to melted mixture. Stir well until smooth and slightly thickened.
Spread chocolate evenly on top of crust base. Pour the cheese mixture over the chocolate, ensuring it covers it completely.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until filling is set but still soft in texture.
Allow pie to cool before serving.
